## Summary

Describe the change.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Security / reliability

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] Manual app check, if UI/reporting changed
- [ ] Documentation updated, if behavior changed

## Safety And Data Review

- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] No private generated run artifacts committed
- [ ] New dependencies reviewed for licensing/security impact
- [ ] Runtime probing changes preserve safe, limited behavior

## Notes For Reviewers

Add any architecture, tradeoff, or limitation notes.
